# RemoteDesk Batch 20 - Generated Files Manifest

This document lists all files generated or modified as part of RemoteDesk Batch 20, focusing on Advanced Mobile Features, Predictive Maintenance, AR Support, and the Developer Ecosystem.

- `remotedesk/packages/shared/src/mobile-advanced/mobile-host.dto.ts`
- `remotedesk/packages/shared/src/mobile-advanced/mobile-gestures.dto.ts`
- `remotedesk/packages/shared/src/mobile-advanced/biometric-auth.dto.ts`
- `remotedesk/apps/mobile/src/MobileGestureService.ts`
- `remotedesk/apps/mobile/src/BiometricAuthService.ts`
- `remotedesk/apps/api/src/mobile/MobileHostService.ts`
- `remotedesk/apps/api/src/mobile/mobile-advanced.routes.ts`
- `remotedesk/docs/mobile-advanced/mobile-host-capabilities.md`
- `remotedesk/docs/mobile-advanced/mobile-gestures.md`
